title: HK release of 333 now for sale on YesAsiacom
display_title: HK release of 333 now for sale on YesAsiacom
wikitext:
[]: HK release of 3.33 now for sale on YesAsia.com             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Wed Aug 21, 2013 1:33 am And yes, English subtitles are available. Just ordered mine: US$37.99 including shipping. [url]http://www.yesasia.com/us/evangelion-3-33-you-can-not-redo-blu-ray-limited-edition-english-subtitled/1033926157-0-0-0-en/info.html[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by TheDrmcvey » Wed Aug 21, 2013 8:42 am I really do want to get this movie, but at the same time I'm patient enough to wait for Funimation to release an English dub of it first so I can have both the English and Japanese tracks of the film.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Wed Aug 21, 2013 11:57 pm I actually haven't seen 3.33 yet because I didn't want to do it off the Internet or something else that was sub-standard quality. I have the HK version of the the other two and was pretty pleased with the translation, if you don't have the patience to wait until next year this is probably your best chance at a clean English sub.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Thu Aug 22, 2013 1:36 am You do know that you can find copies of the movie in 1080p online, right? If that is what you meant by quality, anyway. Also, some fansub groups do a job that's at least on par with the official translation IMO. I was more than happy with the subs UTW made.

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Thu Aug 22, 2013 2:55 am I'm sure there's some good quality files online, for both high definition video and the audio. I just wanted the BD as soon as someone came out with a version with English subs. The HK set looks nice, comes with the artbook and some other premiums as well as the disc.

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Thu Aug 22, 2013 11:46 am I'm still waiting for Funi; not because I want the English dub, but because I'd rather support the Funimation release than some Hong Kong company.

[]:             Quote Post by Ah Q » Thu Aug 22, 2013 1:31 pm Hope it's available in HK stores. I'll be there next week.

[]:             Quote Post by Merkaba » Thu Aug 29, 2013 5:11 pm Just a heads-up: I, too, ordered the Blu-ray from YesAsia, and when I did, the release date was supposed to be today, Aug. 29. When I jumped on to see whether or not it has shipped, I saw that they moved back the release date to Sept. 12. So if you were expecting to receive it soon, like I was, you'll be disappointed.

[]:             Quote Post by Ah Q » Fri Aug 30, 2013 1:26 am Yep. On 8/28, HMV's website said 3.33 would be released in HK the following day on 8/29. I am in HK this week and checked a few stores that day, but came up empty-handed. I checked HMV's website again, and it too had revised the date to 9/12.

[]:             Quote Post by Merkaba » Tue Sep 10, 2013 8:41 am Another heads-up: I just jumped on to YesAsia's site to see if 3.33 would still be released on Sept. 12, and they moved it back yet again. It's (supposedly) going to be released another week later, now on Sept. 19.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Tue Sep 10, 2013 1:05 pm What's this about 36 minutes of extra footage I see on the bottom of the page?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Tue Sep 10, 2013 1:27 pm Rei IV wrote: What's this about 36 minutes of extra footage I see on the bottom of the page?

[]:             Quote Post by Grand Duke of Yashima » Mon Oct 07, 2013 9:41 pm My copy of 3.33 arrived from YesAsia today. Will report back soon... SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Oct 07, 2013 10:38 pm Neat! Looking forward to your thoughts. :) If you could let us know how they translate Asuka and Shinji's exchange during the battle ( Github subs: 01:11:45 {Shinji} Asuka! I'm begging you, stay out of the way! 01:11:49 {Asuka} Go down already, bratty Shinji! ) that would be great.
